'''Iceberg Four''' was the eighth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]] and also the farthest from its [[Daca/Legends|sun]]. It was used as a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] staging area during the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
